description_long: This is a cylindrical trash bin with a matte dark brown body and contrasting lighter brown top and bottom rims. The top surface features a grid of circular perforations, likely for ventilation or odor control, and is flat in design. The front of the bin displays the label 'Clean Air Tube' in white, stylized text, indicating a focus on air quality or filtered waste management. The body appears to be constructed from metal, providing durability for outdoor urban environments, while the lid and base may be made of coated metal or heavy-duty plastic. There are no visible handles or wheels, suggesting it is intended to remain stationary. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near public buildings.
description: A modern cylindrical trash bin with a dark brown body, lighter brown flat perforated lid, and 'Clean Air Tube' label on the front. The design is sleek, durable, and suitable for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: The trash bin is shown with its side visible, revealing part of the 'Clean Air Tube' label and the perforated flat lid.
description_view_1: This view shows the bin from the back, with no visible labeling or distinguishing marks, highlighting the smooth cylindrical surface.
description_view_2: The bin is seen from an angle, showing a partial view of the label and the flat, perforated lid.
description_view_3: The front view displays the full 'Clean Air Tube' label and the flat, perforated lid, making it the most informative perspective.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Front label with 'Clean Air Tube' in white text
